sentiment.reasoning: Investor days are informational events that rarely trigger immediate material financial shifts.

sentiment.reasoning: Industry awards provide positive brand sentiment but lack direct, measurable financial impact on the bottom line.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
